summary: This source is a modern scholarly introduction to the treatise 'On the Cosmos' (De Mundo). It discusses the text's origins, concluding that it is a deliberate Hellenistic forgery by a Neo-Pythagorean author imitating Aristotle, rather than a genuine work by Aristotle himself. Because the text is a commentary on a spurious work, it contains no direct quotes, principles, or frameworks from the historical Aristotle.
